## Checklist

- [ ] API docs reviewed
- [ ] `backend/{provider}_service.py` created extending `BaseMDMService`
- [ ] `sync_devices()` tested against real or sandbox instance
- [ ] `docs/{provider}.md` setup guide written
- [ ] `.env.example` updated
- [ ] `README.md` integration table updated
- [ ] `main.py` routing updated
- [ ] PR opened
